arts.ttl: 2 changes, Solomon rested: Leeds United predicted XI to face Luton Town
arts.sum: Leeds United return to Elland Road on Wednesday evening to take on Luton Town, eager to make it three wins on the bounce after dramatic victory at Swansea City on Sunday. Thankfully for Leeds, Daniel Farke revealed in his pre-match press conference that there are no new injuries for him to contend with following that chaotic victory in South Wales.

arts.ttl: ‘Best player on the pitch’ – Leeds United man hailed by EFL pundit after Swansea City win
arts.sum: Leeds United attacker Dan James was the ‘best player on the pitch’ against Swansea City, according to EFL… The post ‘Best player on the pitch’ – Leeds United man hailed by EFL pundit after Swansea City win appeared first on The72 - Football League News.

arts.ttl: Chris Wilder makes Sheffield United takeover plea as rivals Leeds United and Sunderland watch on
arts.sum: “When it does happen, or if it doesn’t happen, definitely for January we need to strengthen and feel that especially after losing Arblaster, it’s important that when [we get injuries] we have a strong bench and strong group so I’d like to think we’ll be able to do some business in January. arts.ttl: Daniel Farke has already been given clear Leeds United January transfer window instruction
arts.sum: Get Leeds United news to your phone with our WhatsApp community By joining the Leeds United community on WhatsApp, you'll see the biggest and best stories as soon as they happen.

arts.ttl: Leeds United, Sunderland and Sheffield United next five games compared as title credentials call made
arts.sum: Fourth-placed Burnley have arguably the best fixture list this week with 17th-placed Coventry at The Hawthorns tonight before a game at 12th-placed Stoke City this weekend, while Middlesbrough have a home double-header against Blackburn Rovers and underperforming Hull City. While Leeds face a tricky test, so do their nearest league rivals with Sunderland and Sheffield United meeting each other at Bramall Lane on Friday night.

arts.ttl: View: Leeds certain to let Gelhardt leave
arts.sum: Leeds United forward Joe Gelhardt has been on the fringes ever since he returned from his Sunderland loan in 2023, with Daniel Farke unable to find a place for him in the side at all. On the fringes this season and last has been Joe Gelhardt, returning from a loan spell at Sunderland when Leeds were relegated, only to find himself unable to make any sort of impact under the current manager.

arts.ttl: Potential Leeds United line up for Luton Town with two attacking players axed
arts.sum: Buoyed after a pulsating win at Swansea City, Farke's team are in a good place as they prepare for their second match in four days. Predicted United XI for Luton Town: Meslier; Bogle, Rodon, Struijk, Byram; Rothwell, Tanaka; James, Gnonto, Solomon; Joseph.
